R_4e_decomposition_log._note: Scalar approximation: averages of nonlinear terms over boundary; small/moderate discrepancies vs measured can come from Jensen/covariance, not necessarily a missing Stern/diffuse term.  Order-of-magnitude discrepancies indicate a missing residual term.
